_meta.note: gender, cost, gross_margin, gross_margin_pct and financial_tier are ENRICHMENT fields added for Veloxa value-based routing. Cost/margin figures are illustrative (synthetic) placeholders; replace with real COGS if available.
_meta.tier_logic: financial_tier = 'Premium' if gross_margin >= $85 (USD) else 'Commodity'. Premium tier -> route to Claude Opus 4.6; Commodity -> GPT-5.4.
